entities.name: objective
entities.context: refers to the goals of the knowledge system

entities.name: constraints
entities.context: refers to limitations within the knowledge system

entities.name: stakes
entities.context: refers to the importance or risks associated with decisions in the knowledge system

entities.name: task complexity
entities.context: refers to the level of difficulty encountered in tasks

entities.name: multiple personas
entities.context: refers to the different user profiles or perspectives considered

entities.name: quality targets
entities.context: refers to specific standards set for outputs

entities.name: rigor level
entities.context: refers to the thoroughness or strictness of assessments

entities.name: depth
entities.context: refers to the level of detail required

entities.name: types of alternatives
entities.context: refers to the various options that need to be considered
